activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their first name

response_steps.description: Read legal first and middle name(s) from ID.

step_mappings.explanation: Ground truth step 1 asks for the first name verbally, while response steps 1 and 2 together achieve the same outcome by requesting ID and reading the name from it. The approach differs but the functional goal is the same.

ground_truth_steps.description: Confirm the spelling of the name with the patient

response_steps.description: Read legal first and middle name(s) from ID.

step_mappings.explanation: Ground truth step 2 confirms spelling verbally, while response step 2 reads the name from an official ID, which inherently ensures correct spelling. Both aim to verify the name's accuracy.

ground_truth_steps.description: Enter the name into the registration system

response_steps.description: Enter first and middle name(s) into HIS.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe entering the patient's name into a registration system (HIS vs. registration system). The action and outcome are functionally equivalent.
Response step 4 (returning ID) has no corresponding step in the ground truth, as the ground truth does not include handling of physical identification.

unmatched_response_steps.reason: This step is not present in the ground truth process, which does not involve requesting or returning physical identification.
